zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Greene於大約1600年出生在英國。他於大約1627年與Elizabeth在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1667年12月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登享年68歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可馬爾登貝爾 洛克 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Greene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Green  . In North America, this surname has assimilated cognates from other languages.

variants.name: Green
meanings: English: either a nickname for someone who was fond of dressing in this color (Old English grēne) or was young or immature, or who had played the part of the ‘Green Man’ in the May Day celebrations, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a village green (Middle English grene, a transferred use of the color term). This is one of the most common and widespread of English surnames. In North America it has assimilated cognates from other languages, notably German Grün (see Gruen ) and Dutch Groen ; compare 7 below. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: alternatively, from a Middle English personal name Grene.
Irish: adopted for Ó hUainín ‘descendant of Uainín’, a personal name from a pet form of uaine ‘green’, see Honan .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
Oldest Grave Seen in the Memorials List

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Greene was born about 1600, in England. He married Elizabeth about 1627, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 19 December 1667, in Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 68, and was buried in Bell Rock Cemetery, Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Greeneは約1600年にイギリスで生まれた。約1627年にイギリスでElizabethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1667年12月19日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスマルデンで68歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスマルデンベル ロック セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Greene(은)는 대략 1600년 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1627년 영국에서 Elizabeth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1667년 12월 19일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 맬든에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 맬든 벨 록 세멧리에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Greene родился около 1600 г. в местности Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth около 1627 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 19 декабря 1667 г. в местности малден, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности белл рокк кеметири, малден, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Thomas Greene nació aproximadamente 1600, en Inglaterra. Se casó con Elizabeth aproximadamente 1627, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 19 de diciembre de 1667, en Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Bell Rock Cemetery, Malden, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
